creator: number201724@me.com
text:
Created attachment 222187
screenshot

When I use sftp to transfer a close to 30GB to freebsd, sftp, sshd and kernel seem to occupy a very high CPU, and the transfer speed is slow. And the speed is only about 50MByte/s.

At the same time, I transfer files to Linux under the same network environment, and it has a speed of more than 100MByte/s. And the cpu usage is low.


Attached is a screenshot
